coast_mountain.name: Mountain Coast
coast_mountain.description: Rocky cliffs and the sea below.

coast_plains_diagonal.name: Plains Coast (diagonal)
coast_plains_diagonal.description: Grasslands meeting the sea on a diagonal.

deep_ocean.name: Deep Ocean
deep_ocean.description: Open seas; treacherous without a deep-water vessel.

forest_autumn.name: Autumn Forest
forest_autumn.description: Deciduous forest in autumn; the canopy is on fire with color.

forest_to_plains_diagonal.name: Forest/Plains Edge (diagonal)
forest_to_plains_diagonal.description: Where forest meets open plains, on a diagonal.

forest_to_plains_vertical.name: Forest/Plains Edge (N-S)
forest_to_plains_vertical.description: Where forest meets open plains, running north-south.

forest_to_swamp.name: Marshy Forest
forest_to_swamp.description: Where forest grows mossy and gives way to swampland.

forest_winter.name: Winter Forest
forest_winter.description: Bare branches and snowy ground; the trees offer little cover.

lake_district.name: Lake District
lake_district.description: Plains dotted with freshwater ponds and small lakes.

large_village_in_plains.name: Large Village
large_village_in_plains.description: A larger village with a market square and chapel.

mountain_range.name: Mountains
mountain_range.description: Rocky peaks and scree slopes; very slow travel.

river_through_forest_autumn_NS.name: River Through Autumn Forest (N-S)
river_through_forest_autumn_NS.description: Autumn forest with a wide river running through.

river_through_forest_NS.name: River Through Forest (N-S)
river_through_forest_NS.description: Summer forest with a wide river running through.

river_through_forest_spring_NS.name: River Through Spring Forest (N-S)
river_through_forest_spring_NS.description: Spring forest with a wide river running through.

river_through_forest_winter_NS.name: River Through Winter Forest (N-S)
river_through_forest_winter_NS.description: Snowy winter forest with a wide river running through.

river_through_plains_diagonal.name: River Through Plains (diagonal)
river_through_plains_diagonal.description: Open grassland crossed by a river on a diagonal.

river_through_plains_NS.name: River Through Plains (N-S)
river_through_plains_NS.description: Open grassland crossed by a river running north-south.

small_village_in_plains.name: Small Village
small_village_in_plains.description: A small rural village set in open plains.

swamp.name: Swamp
swamp.description: Murky stagnant water and gnarled trees; difficult terrain.
